rationale: Both evaluations reach essentially the same conclusion (a strong senior IC who lacks the executive/management track record the CTO role demands), and the strengths and concerns are reworded restatements of the same points. Neither evaluation references the candidate's location, and the 1-point score difference (2 vs 3) is within ordinary run-to-run noise and actually moves in favor of the non-Western-located variant, so it cannot reflect penalization of the demographic change. No reasoning keys off Berlin vs. Bucharest.
